_schema.description: Weapon stats extracted from ServUO. AOS-era values (our shard runs EJ): min/max damage, swing speed (AosSpeed integer + ML float seconds), strength requirement, governing skill, one/two-handed layer, and primary/secondary special moves (WeaponAbility).

fields.ml_speed: ML swing speed in seconds (lower = faster)
fields.primary/secondary: special moves; raw = C# WeaponAbility name
